hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; [ -f package.json ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md) pnpm exec prettier --write --log-level=error "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; exit 0

[ -f package.json ] || exit 0; out=$(pnpm -s typecheck 2>&1); tc=$?; out2=$(pnpm -s lint 2>&1); ln=$?; if [ $tc -ne 0 ] || [ $ln -ne 0 ]; then echo "Type or lint errors remain. Fix before declaring the task done." >&2; [ $tc -ne 0 ] && echo "--- typecheck ---" >&2 && echo "$out" | tail -40 >&2; [ $ln -ne 0 ] && echo "--- lint ---" >&2 && echo "$out2" | tail -40 >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
